title: Cleopatra (disambiguation)
content: Cleopatra (69–30 BC) was the last active Ptolemaic ruler of Egypt before it became a Roman province. Cleopatra may also refer to: Given name. From the Greek name Κλεοπάτρα (Kleopatra) meaning "glory of the father", derived from κλέος (kleos) meaning "glory" combined with πατήρ (pater) meaning "father" (genitive πατρός).
